use_cases: Loading states in SaaS dashboards with animated dot sequences
Progress feedback during data fetching or processing
Onboarding step indicators with animated transitions
Status updates in dev-tools and creator platforms
ai_summary: An animated dot-flow loader component that cycles through configurable dot frames using GSAP-powered blur and opacity transitions. Features smooth y-axis movement animations and coordinated text cycling, ideal for sophisticated loading states in modern SaaS applications and developer tools.
